summary.en: A sourcing and licensing platform for rights-cleared multimodal AI training data.
summary.zh: 一個提供版權已釐清的多模態 AI 訓練資料的採購與授權平台。

highlight.en: Luel works with frontier AI teams to supply both bespoke data collections and off-the-shelf datasets, all rights-cleared and at scale.
highlight.zh: Luel 與前沿 AI 團隊合作，提供客製化資料集與現成資料集，全部版權已釐清且可大規模供應。

summary.en: Autonomous AI agents that answer calls, close sales, and run hotel operations.
summary.zh: 自主 AI 代理，負責接聽電話、完成銷售並執行飯店營運。

highlight.en: Built on Computer Use Agent technology, Lance navigates existing hotel software and supports 50+ hotels across brands like Marriott, Hilton, and Hyatt.
highlight.zh: Lance 基於 Computer Use Agent 技術，能操作現有飯店軟體，並支援 Marriott、Hilton、Hyatt 等品牌旗下 50 多家飯店。

summary.en: A global AI-native law firm that handles legal work with same-day turnaround at lower cost.
summary.zh: 一家全球 AI 原生律師事務所，以更低費用當日完成法律工作。

highlight.en: Moritz's AI does 80% of the work so clients pay elite lawyers only for the final 20%; its lawyers have closed deals with an average 4-hour turnaround.
highlight.zh: Moritz 的 AI 完成 80% 的工作，客戶只需為頂尖律師處理最後 20% 付費；其律師平均以 4 小時完成交易。

summary.en: An operating system for automotive retail that automates technicians' administrative work.
summary.zh: 一套汽車零售作業系統，自動化技師的行政工作。

highlight.en: Revion's first product targets the admin tasks draining 30-40% of a technician's day, letting auto retailers service more vehicles at higher margins.
highlight.zh: Revion 的首款產品鎖定占用技師 30-40% 工時的行政事務，讓汽車零售商能以更高利潤維修更多車輛。

summary.en: Multilingual voice agents that run high-volume calling operations without engineering teams.
summary.zh: 多語言語音代理，無需工程團隊即可執行大量電話作業。

highlight.en: Samora's agents sound local, follow strict rules, hand off to humans when calls turn sensitive, and update CRMs, ticketing, and ATS systems automatically.
highlight.zh: Samora 的代理聽起來在地化、嚴格遵守規則，遇到敏感通話時交由真人接手，並自動更新 CRM、工單與 ATS 系統。

summary.en: A mobile and web platform for creating and ripping digital collectible card packs.
summary.zh: 一個用於創建與開封數位收藏卡包的行動與網頁平台。

highlight.en: Collectors build custom Pokemon and sports mystery packs with cryptographically trusted odds, get physical cards shipped, and receive buyback offers.
highlight.zh: 收藏者可建立有密碼學保證機率的客製化寶可夢與運動神秘卡包，獲得實體卡寄送，並收到回購報價。

summary.en: AI agents that run continuous penetration tests against apps and infrastructure.
summary.zh: AI 代理，對應用程式與基礎設施持續執行滲透測試。

highlight.en: Instead of an annual pentest, Hex Security's agents work 24/7 to find and verify critical vulnerabilities so teams can fix them before attackers strike.
highlight.zh: Hex Security 的代理不靠年度滲透測試，而是全天候運作，找出並驗證關鍵漏洞，讓團隊能在攻擊者下手前修補。

summary.en: GRU Space is building permanent lunar infrastructure, starting with the first hotel on the Moon.
summary.zh: GRU Space 正打造永久性月球基礎設施，從月球上第一座飯店開始。

highlight.en: GRU built patent-pending hardware that turns lunar regolith into bricks and inflates pressurized habitats, with a first Moon mission planned for 2027.
highlight.zh: GRU 打造出專利申請中的硬體，能將月壤轉化為磚塊並充氣展開加壓棲息艙，首次登月任務預計於 2027 年進行。

summary.en: An AI-native law firm and legal operating system built for startups.
summary.zh: 一家專為新創打造的 AI 原生律師事務所兼法律作業系統。

highlight.en: Vector pairs lawyers averaging 10+ years of Big Law experience with custom AI to cover fundraising, contracts, formations, and M&A at far below Big Law rates.
highlight.zh: Vector 結合平均擁有 10 年以上頂尖律所經驗的律師與客製 AI，以遠低於大型律所的費用涵蓋募資、合約、公司設立與併購。

summary.en: A globally distributed network of autonomous drones for Earth observation.
summary.zh: 一個用於地球觀測的全球分散式自主無人機網路。

highlight.en: Voltair starts with power utilities, using long-range weatherized drones and pole-mounted charging pads that each unlock 1,000 square miles of coverage.
highlight.zh: Voltair 從電力公司切入，使用長程耐候無人機與裝在電線桿上的充電板，每個充電板可解鎖 1,000 平方英里的覆蓋範圍。

summary.en: Space solar arrays that grow from the size of a dining table to a football field in orbit.
summary.zh: 可在軌道上從餐桌大小展開至足球場大小的太空太陽能陣列。

highlight.en: Founded by a CMU PhD who built kilometer-scale NASA structures and a SpaceX veteran, Beyond Reach targets a projected 500x jump in orbital power demand by 2030.
highlight.zh: 由曾為 NASA 打造公里級結構的 CMU 博士與 SpaceX 資深工程師創立，Beyond Reach 鎖定 2030 年前軌道電力需求預計暴增 500 倍的市場。

summary.en: A mobile trading app for accessing global markets and liquidity.
summary.zh: 一款用於存取全球市場與流動性的行動交易應用程式。

highlight.en: Instinct aims to be the app of all finance built on Hyperliquid, giving everyone worldwide access to the global market from their phone.
highlight.zh: Instinct 立志成為建構於 Hyperliquid 之上的全方位金融應用，讓全球每個人都能透過手機存取全球市場。

summary.en: AI infrastructure for building and running real-time vision applications.
summary.zh: 用於建構與運行即時視覺應用的 AI 基礎設施。

highlight.en: Overshoot lets 300+ developers connect live video to a large collection of Vision Language Models in three lines of code, returning responses in under 200ms.
highlight.zh: Overshoot 讓 300 多位開發者只用三行程式碼即可將即時影像連接到大量視覺語言模型，並在 200 毫秒內回應。

summary.en: An AI front- and back-office agent for dental practices.
summary.zh: 為牙科診所打造的 AI 前台與後台代理。

highlight.en: Patientdesk is an AI bookings system that handles scheduling, payments, and insurance to fill providers' calendars with high-value appointments.
highlight.zh: Patientdesk 是一套 AI 預約系統，處理排程、付款與保險，為診所填滿高價值的看診時段。

summary.en: A finance-compliant proactive AI that runs 24/7 across your network and pipeline.
summary.zh: 一款符合金融合規、全天候運行於人脈與案源中的主動式 AI。

highlight.en: Maywood flags when targets gear up for a process, drafts outreach in your voice, auto-updates CRMs, and builds meeting briefs from internal and external data.
highlight.zh: Maywood 會標記交易對象何時準備啟動流程、以你的口吻草擬聯絡訊息、自動更新 CRM，並從內外部資料建立會議簡報。

summary.en: Low-latency execution across crypto, prediction markets, and tokenized assets.
summary.zh: 橫跨加密貨幣、預測市場與代幣化資產的低延遲交易執行。

highlight.en: Sequence built proprietary low-latency infrastructure and routing software so traders can package one market view into a single trade across many venues.
highlight.zh: Sequence 打造專有的低延遲基礎設施與路由軟體，讓交易者能將單一市場觀點打包成一筆橫跨多個交易場所的交易。

summary.en: A reliability and monitoring layer for AI agents.
summary.zh: 為 AI 代理打造的可靠性與監控層。

highlight.en: Moda surfaces patterns across agent hallucinations, forgetfulness, and tool-call failures while tracking user frustration, NPS, retention, and churn.
highlight.zh: Moda 揭露代理在幻覺、遺忘與工具呼叫失敗上的模式，同時追蹤使用者挫折感、NPS、留存率與流失率。

summary.en: A 'manipulate anything' robotics model paired with the hardware that embodies it.
summary.zh: 一套「萬物操作」機器人模型，搭配實現該模型的硬體。

highlight.en: Origami's hand-based collection device exactly matches its high-DOF direct-drive robotic hand, eliminating the embodiment gap for in-the-wild data collection.
highlight.zh: Origami 的手部資料收集裝置與其高自由度直驅機械手完全匹配，消除本體差異，可在真實環境中收集資料。

summary.en: An AI-native CRM built for startups.
summary.zh: 一套專為新創打造的 AI 原生 CRM。

highlight.en: Fixture pulls customer communications and marketing channels into one go-to-market context store, with agents that move deals forward from any AI tool.
highlight.zh: Fixture 將客戶溝通與行銷管道整合進單一市場進攻情境儲存庫，代理會從任何 AI 工具推進交易。

summary.en: An AI operator for medical-legal cases, from intake to settlement.
summary.zh: 為醫療法律案件打造的 AI 操作員，從受理到和解一手包辦。

highlight.en: Wayco is building a unified data intelligence layer for the medical treatment of legal cases, spanning first intake through instant settlement.
highlight.zh: Wayco 正為法律案件中的醫療處置打造統一的資料智慧層，涵蓋從初次受理到即時和解的全程。

summary.en: Data infrastructure for real estate, covering comps, ownership, zoning, and financials.
summary.zh: 為房地產打造的資料基礎設施，涵蓋成交比較、所有權、分區與財務資訊。

highlight.en: Travo lets anyone search any property or parcel for instant rental comps, ownership, zoning, and financials, powering AI apps for PE firms and brokers.
highlight.zh: Travo 讓使用者搜尋任何物業或地塊並即時取得租金比較、所有權、分區與財務資料，為私募基金與經紀人提供 AI 應用支援。

summary.en: A decisional AI layer that sits on top of logistics systems for global supply chains.
summary.zh: 一個位於物流系統之上、服務全球供應鏈的決策型 AI 層。

highlight.en: Haladir unifies WMS, TMS, and OMS data into one operational graph and embeds solver-grade optimization and ML into the decisions that power supply chains.
highlight.zh: Haladir 將 WMS、TMS、OMS 資料整合為單一營運圖譜，並將求解器級的最佳化與機器學習嵌入驅動供應鏈的決策中。

summary.en: A context layer that makes AI-native CPG brands' unified data legible to any AI tool via MCP.
summary.zh: 一個情境層，透過 MCP 讓 AI 原生消費品牌的整合資料能被任何 AI 工具讀取。

highlight.en: Corvera lets brands deploy AI agents via Claude or ChatGPT and automate workflows from category management to supply chain in a secure, audited environment.
highlight.zh: Corvera 讓品牌透過 Claude 或 ChatGPT 部署 AI 代理，並在安全、可稽核的環境中自動化從品類管理到供應鏈的工作流程。

summary.en: AI benchmarks that measure general intelligence and inspire new research ideas.
summary.zh: 衡量通用智慧並激發新研究構想的 AI 基準測試。

highlight.en: Founded by Mike Knoop and Francois Chollet, ARC Prize's ARC-AGI benchmark has been used by OpenAI, Anthropic, Google DeepMind, and xAI to guide the path to AGI.
highlight.zh: 由 Mike Knoop 與 Francois Chollet 創立，ARC Prize 的 ARC-AGI 基準已被 OpenAI、Anthropic、Google DeepMind 與 xAI 採用，引導通往 AGI 的道路。

summary.en: AI and data for cancer therapeutics built on patient-derived single-cell datasets.
summary.zh: 以病患來源單細胞資料集為基礎的癌症療法 AI 與資料服務。

highlight.en: Origin is creating the largest patient-derived cancer single-cell dataset, screening drug and genetic-medicine effects under its own DNA switches for licensing.
highlight.zh: Origin 正建立最大的病患來源癌症單細胞資料集，在自有 DNA 開關控制下篩選藥物與基因醫療的效果以供授權。

summary.en: A full-stack inference service that eliminates the AI data-movement bottleneck.
summary.zh: 一套消除 AI 資料搬移瓶頸的全端推論服務。

highlight.en: Piris pairs proprietary photonic hardware with optimized software to minimize the GPU memory wall and make trillion-parameter model economics sustainable.
highlight.zh: Piris 將專有光子硬體與最佳化軟體結合，以減少 GPU 的記憶體牆，讓兆級參數模型的單位成本得以永續。

summary.en: A desktop AI app that generates custom, shareable workspaces in seconds.
summary.zh: 一款桌面 AI 應用，能在數秒內生成可分享的客製化工作空間。

highlight.en: Carson replaces the chat box with generated workspaces so teams collaborate with AI on tasks like processing insurance claims or emailing big clients.
highlight.zh: Carson 以生成式工作空間取代聊天框，讓團隊能與 AI 協作處理保險理賠或寄信給大客戶等任務。

summary.en: An AI-native workspace for architecture firms that automates non-design work.
summary.zh: 為建築事務所打造的 AI 原生工作空間，自動化非設計工作。

highlight.en: Avoice's agents understand drawings, specs, schedules, materials, and codes; firms on the platform already manage over $300M in active projects.
highlight.zh: Avoice 的代理能理解圖紙、規格、進度、材料與規範；平台上的事務所已管理超過 3 億美元的進行中專案。

summary.en: Automate any UI task across browser and desktop apps with natural language.
summary.zh: 用自然語言自動化瀏覽器與桌面應用中的任何 UI 任務。

highlight.en: RamAIn turns repetitive cross-application processes into composable APIs that are fully managed, self-healing, and self-evolving, with no API access required.
highlight.zh: RamAIn 將跨應用的重複流程轉化為可組合的 API，全程託管、自我修復且自我演進，無需 API 存取權限。

summary.en: An AI-native recruiting OS that automates sourcing, outreach, screening, and qualification.
summary.zh: 一套 AI 原生招募作業系統，自動化人才搜尋、外聯、篩選與資格認定。

highlight.en: Perfectly delivers interview-ready candidates to Slack via recruiting agent Paul, which gives each candidate white-glove treatment; clients include LlamaIndex.
highlight.zh: Perfectly 透過招募代理 Paul 將可面試的候選人送到 Slack，並為每位候選人提供貼心服務；客戶包括 LlamaIndex。

summary.en: An API that compresses LLM context to cut token costs and improve accuracy.
summary.zh: 一個壓縮 LLM 情境以降低 token 成本並提升準確度的 API。

highlight.en: Compresr is a drop-in for agents and RAG that shrinks context without losing what matters, lowering token costs while improving accuracy.
highlight.zh: Compresr 可直接套用於代理與 RAG，在不丟失重要資訊的前提下縮減情境，同時降低 token 成本並提升準確度。

summary.en: Agentic AI software for intellectual property, starting with patent litigation.
summary.zh: 為智慧財產權打造的代理式 AI 軟體，從專利訴訟切入。

highlight.en: Stilta runs search and analysis at a scale manual methods can't match, with every output source-backed and auditable for IP law firms and in-house teams.
highlight.zh: Stilta 以人工方法難以企及的規模執行搜尋與分析，每項產出皆有來源佐證且可稽核，服務智財律所與企業內部團隊。

summary.en: An orchestration platform for background agents that use filesystems.
summary.zh: 為使用檔案系統的背景代理打造的編排平台。

highlight.en: Terminal Use is CLI-first, making it easy for coding agents to experiment and continuously improve the agents you've deployed.
highlight.zh: Terminal Use 以 CLI 為核心，讓編碼代理能輕鬆實驗並持續改進你已部署的代理。

summary.en: An AI primary care doctor in your pocket that delivers continuous, proactive care.
summary.zh: 口袋裡的 AI 家庭醫師，提供持續且主動的照護。

highlight.en: Prana connects to records and wearables to catch 'clinical drift' between visits and automates 90% of the grunt work so human doctors focus on key decisions.
highlight.zh: Prana 連接病歷與穿戴裝置以捕捉就診間的「臨床漂移」，並自動化 90% 的繁瑣工作，讓真人醫師專注於關鍵決策。

summary.en: An agentic video editor that produces a strong first cut in minutes from footage and a goal.
summary.zh: 一款代理式影片編輯器，能依素材與目標在數分鐘內產出高品質初剪。

highlight.en: Cardboard pairs a browser-based high-performance editor built on WebGPU/WebCodecs with an 'AI director' that reasons over footage for growth teams and creators.
highlight.zh: Cardboard 將基於 WebGPU/WebCodecs 的瀏覽器高效能編輯器與能解讀素材的「AI 導演」結合，服務成長團隊與創作者。

summary.en: An AIOps agent that puts ML teams' AI infrastructure on autopilot.
summary.zh: 一款 AIOps 代理，讓機器學習團隊的 AI 基礎設施自動駕駛。

highlight.en: Chamber's agents monitor, detect failures, run root-cause analysis, resolve issues, and optimize AI workloads across clouds like an autonomous infra team.
highlight.zh: Chamber 的代理如同自主基礎設施團隊，跨雲端監控、偵測故障、進行根因分析、解決問題並最佳化 AI 工作負載。

summary.en: AI workers that automate the back office for field-services trades.
summary.zh: 為現場服務行業自動化後勤的 AI 工作者。

highlight.en: Ressl runs proactive agents for quoting, estimating, procurement, and scheduling on top of the legacy software HVAC, plumbing, and collision shops already own.
highlight.zh: Ressl 在 HVAC、水電、車身維修等業者既有的老舊軟體之上，運行報價、估價、採購與排程的主動式代理。

summary.en: A multimodal data provider for robotics and world modeling.
summary.zh: 為機器人與世界模型打造的多模態資料供應商。

highlight.en: Human Archive deploys biomimetic hardware across homes and factories, then runs QA, anonymization, and annotation to deliver high-fidelity datasets to labs.
highlight.zh: Human Archive 在住家與工廠部署仿生硬體，再透過品管、匿名化與標註，為實驗室提供高保真資料集。

summary.en: Realtime AI for sales calls that helps reps handle questions and objections live.
summary.zh: 為銷售通話打造的即時 AI，協助業務在通話中處理問題與異議。

highlight.en: Caretta joins live calls from Slack to handle info requests and objections, getting smarter as every call expands its knowledge base and objection library.
highlight.zh: Caretta 從 Slack 加入即時通話以處理資訊請求與異議，並隨著每通電話擴充其知識庫與異議庫而愈發聰明。

summary.en: See and control all AI activity across your enterprise.
summary.zh: 全面檢視並掌控企業內所有 AI 活動。

highlight.en: Oximy is used by security, finance, and transformation teams to track AI adoption, control spend, and manage governance as AI scales across the workforce.
highlight.zh: Oximy 供安全、財務與轉型團隊使用，在 AI 於組織內擴展時追蹤採用情形、控管支出並管理治理。

summary.en: An AI operating system for mega-scale satellite networks.
summary.zh: 為超大規模衛星網路打造的 AI 作業系統。

highlight.en: ConstellationOS provides zero-intervention handoffs, predictive thermal load-balancing, and sub-second optical routing as constellations scale massively.
highlight.zh: ConstellationOS 在衛星星座大規模擴展時，提供零介入交接、預測性熱負載平衡與次秒級光學路由。

summary.en: Learn languages by doomscrolling level-matched videos in your target language.
summary.zh: 透過刷與你程度相符的目標語言影片來學習語言。

highlight.en: Doomersion shows viral videos in your target language that get gradually harder as you scroll, and gained roughly 15k downloads in its first two weeks.
highlight.zh: Doomersion 播放你目標語言的爆紅影片，並隨著滑動逐漸提高難度，前兩週就獲得約 1.5 萬次下載。

summary.en: Full-stack AI accounting that helps SMBs close their monthly books.
summary.zh: 全端 AI 會計服務，協助中小企業完成每月結帳。

highlight.en: Balance's agents do the work of an in-house finance hire, reconciling books in real time and flagging issues before they become problems.
highlight.zh: Balance 的代理能勝任內部財務人員的工作，即時對帳並在問題惡化前提出警示。

summary.en: Building a consumer internet that adapts to each user via constant experimentation.
summary.zh: 透過持續實驗，打造能因應每位使用者的消費者網路。

highlight.en: Polymorph's agents run thousands of experiments to scale customers' product ideas and brand, built by a team from a unicorn, Scale AI, AWS Bedrock, and Meta.
highlight.zh: Polymorph 的代理執行數千次實驗以擴展客戶的產品構想與品牌，團隊來自獨角獸、Scale AI、AWS Bedrock 與 Meta。

summary.en: Building the world's largest searchable video library for AI labs.
summary.zh: 為 AI 實驗室打造全球最大的可搜尋影片資料庫。

highlight.en: Shofo has indexed billions of videos and uses agents to extract, label, and deliver custom datasets, like 100K hours of cooking videos with annotations.
highlight.zh: Shofo 已索引數十億支影片，並運用代理擷取、標註並交付客製化資料集，例如 10 萬小時帶標註的烹飪影片。

summary.en: An AI data analyst that finds revenue opportunities for consumer brands.
summary.zh: 為消費品牌找出營收機會的 AI 資料分析師。

highlight.en: A brand connects all its data sources and Menza provides an AI analyst working 24/7 to find revenue opportunities, cost leaks, trends, and anomalies.
highlight.zh: 品牌連接所有資料來源後，Menza 提供一位全天候運作的 AI 分析師，挖掘營收機會、成本漏洞、趨勢與異常。

summary.en: AI agents that autonomously improve customer retention.
summary.zh: 自主提升客戶留存率的 AI 代理。

highlight.en: Pollen connects to communications, support tickets, product usage, and CRM to monitor every account, then tells teams which need attention and what to do next.
highlight.zh: Pollen 連接溝通、支援工單、產品使用與 CRM 以監控每個帳號，再告訴團隊哪些需要關注並決定下一步。

summary.en: AI-powered automation for internal audit workflows.
summary.zh: 為內部稽核工作流程提供 AI 驅動的自動化。

highlight.en: Oxus automates internal audits for pre-IPO and public companies, including leading payroll providers and public biotechs, getting audits done 10x faster.
highlight.zh: Oxus 為上市前與上市公司自動化內部稽核，客戶包括領先的薪資服務商與上市生技公司，使稽核速度提升 10 倍。

summary.en: Detects impersonation attacks on websites and APIs through outside-in monitoring.
summary.zh: 透過由外而內的監控，偵測針對網站與 API 的冒充攻擊。

highlight.en: Crosslayer correlates signals across DNS, BGP, TLS, and JavaScript; its founders invented the MPIC standard now securing 700M+ websites via 3B certificates.
highlight.zh: Crosslayer 關聯 DNS、BGP、TLS 與 JavaScript 各層訊號；其創辦人發明了 MPIC 標準，目前透過 30 億張憑證保護超過 7 億個網站。

summary.en: Builds digital twins of humans to model rare and hard-to-access behavior data.
summary.zh: 建立人類的數位分身，以建模罕見且難以取得的行為資料。

highlight.en: Mantis combines LLMs with high-fidelity physics simulations to convert rare human behavior data into predictive models.
highlight.zh: Mantis 將 LLM 與高保真物理模擬結合，把罕見的人類行為資料轉化為預測模型。

summary.en: AI agents for corporate accounting teams.
summary.zh: 為企業會計團隊打造的 AI 代理。

highlight.en: FullSeam's agents replace manual tasks that happen outside accounting software, such as accounts payable, accounts receivable, and reconciliation.
highlight.zh: FullSeam 的代理取代發生在會計軟體之外的手動工作，例如應付帳款、應收帳款與對帳。

summary.en: An insurance risk-quantification platform for physical AI and autonomous systems.
summary.zh: 為實體 AI 與自主系統打造的保險風險量化平台。

highlight.en: Valgo builds probabilistic models of routes, tasks, and environments to give insurers simulated loss estimates, founded by Stanford physical-AI safety PhDs.
highlight.zh: Valgo 建立路線、任務與環境的機率模型，為保險公司提供模擬損失估算，由實體 AI 安全領域的史丹佛博士創立。

summary.en: An AI-native commercial insurance brokerage.
summary.zh: 一家 AI 原生的商業保險經紀公司。

highlight.en: Panta combines AI-powered internal workflows with licensed brokers to help businesses secure complex coverage faster.
highlight.zh: Panta 將 AI 驅動的內部工作流程與持牌經紀人結合，協助企業更快取得複雜的保險保障。

summary.en: An AI-native med-legal firm that speeds up workers' compensation settlements.
summary.zh: 一家加速勞工賠償和解的 AI 原生醫療法律事務所。

highlight.en: Docura automates record review, chronologies, and report drafting, turning thousands of pages into structured, compliant summaries for adjusters and lawyers.
highlight.zh: Docura 自動化病歷審查、時序整理與報告草擬，將數千頁文件轉為結構化、合規的摘要，供理賠員與律師使用。

summary.en: Turns existing security cameras into an AI security guard.
summary.zh: 將既有的監控攝影機變成 AI 保全人員。

highlight.en: Lexius upgrades every camera instantly with no rip-and-replace to detect, document, and alert incidents like shoplifting and slip-and-falls on messy old CCTV.
highlight.zh: Lexius 無需拆換即可即時升級每台攝影機，在雜亂老舊的監視系統上偵測、記錄並警示如順手牽羊與滑倒等事件。

summary.en: Collects real-world human movement data to train humanoid robots.
summary.zh: 收集真實世界的人類動作資料以訓練人形機器人。

highlight.en: Unlike factory datasets that repeat the same tasks, Asimov captures the full diversity of real homes and businesses, delivering thousands of hours a day.
highlight.zh: 與重複相同任務的工廠資料集不同，Asimov 捕捉真實住家與企業的完整多樣性，每天提供數千小時資料。

summary.en: An AI-native platform for next-generation protein characterization in drug development.
summary.zh: 為藥物開發中的次世代蛋白質表徵打造的 AI 原生平台。

highlight.en: 10x Science automates months of manual protein characterization so developers advance the right candidates; its team came from Stanford's Bertozzi Nobel lab.
highlight.zh: 10x Science 自動化原本耗時數月的人工蛋白質表徵，讓開發者能推進正確的候選藥物；其團隊出身史丹佛 Bertozzi 諾貝爾獎實驗室。

summary.en: An AI-native immigration law firm delivering visa applications in as little as 48 hours.
summary.zh: 一家最快 48 小時完成簽證申請的 AI 原生移民律師事務所。

highlight.en: Drawing on 12,000 successful petitions, LegalOS uses AI agents to draft narratives, compile evidence, and anticipate USCIS objections, with attorney sign-off.
highlight.zh: LegalOS 借鑑 1.2 萬份成功申請案，運用 AI 代理草擬陳述、彙整證據並預判 USCIS 異議，並由律師簽署核可。

summary.en: Infrastructure and UI building blocks for the agentic internet.
summary.zh: 為代理式網際網路打造的基礎設施與 UI 構件。

highlight.en: 21st.dev is the largest React component registry for AI apps, used by 2M developers, offering UI components, agent templates, and an SDK with built-in memory.
highlight.zh: 21st.dev 是面向 AI 應用最大的 React 元件登錄庫，擁有 200 萬名開發者，並提供 UI 元件、代理範本及內建記憶的 SDK。

summary.en: Turning all software into agent-first APIs.
summary.zh: 將所有軟體轉化為以代理為先的 API。

highlight.en: Zatanna's mission is to make every piece of software accessible to AI agents by exposing it as an agent-first API.
highlight.zh: Zatanna 的使命是將每一款軟體以代理優先的 API 形式開放，讓 AI 代理皆可存取。

summary.en: Logistics infrastructure to modernize hospital staffing and operations.
summary.zh: 現代化醫院排班與營運的物流基礎設施。

highlight.en: Scheduling Wizard handles physician scheduling for 20 departments across 16 hospitals, including Mass General, Johns Hopkins, and UCSF, via its own language.
highlight.zh: Scheduling Wizard 透過自有排程程式語言，為 16 家醫院的 20 個科室處理醫師排班，客戶包括麻州總醫院、約翰霍普金斯與 UCSF。

summary.en: An autonomous research engineer that generates, tests, and evolves solutions at machine speed.
summary.zh: 一位以機器速度生成、測試並演化解決方案的自主研究工程師。

highlight.en: Aemon set a world record on an NP-hard optimization problem with under $10 of compute, beating Google DeepMind's 2025 record; its twin founders left college.
highlight.zh: Aemon 以不到 10 美元的運算成本在一個 NP-hard 最佳化問題上創下世界紀錄，超越 Google DeepMind 在 2025 年的紀錄；其雙胞胎創辦人皆從大學輟學。

summary.en: Lets anyone build and publish web games using plain-English prompts.
summary.zh: 讓任何人都能用白話指令建構並發布網頁遊戲。

highlight.en: CodeWisp generates a game's code, structure, and assets from a description and lets users refine via prompts, taking ideas to playable games in minutes.
highlight.zh: CodeWisp 依描述生成遊戲的程式碼、結構與素材，並讓使用者透過指令調整，數分鐘內就能從構想做到可玩遊戲。

summary.en: High-frequency radar systems that detect and track small drones.
summary.zh: 偵測並追蹤小型無人機的高頻雷達系統。

highlight.en: Milliray builds radar designed from the ground up to detect low-signature nano drones threatening airports, critical infrastructure, and front-line defense.
highlight.zh: Milliray 打造從頭設計的雷達，能偵測威脅機場、關鍵基礎設施與前線防禦、訊號特徵極低的奈米級無人機。

summary.en: Financial infrastructure that lets AI agents hold and spend money.
summary.zh: 讓 AI 代理能持有並花費資金的金融基礎設施。

highlight.en: Sponge lets agents transact autonomously via bank accounts, cards, and crypto to buy services like email and browser use, and lets businesses sell to them.
highlight.zh: Sponge 讓代理透過銀行帳戶、信用卡與加密貨幣自主交易以購買電子郵件、瀏覽器使用等服務，並讓企業向代理銷售。

summary.en: Foundation models for planning orthopedic surgery.
summary.zh: 為骨科手術規劃打造的基礎模型。

highlight.en: Mango Medical's agentic AI delivers surgeon-ready orthopedic plans in minutes; it holds an 8-figure LOI from a top orthopedic firm and is pursuing FDA 510(k).
highlight.zh: Mango Medical 的代理式 AI 能在數分鐘內提供可供外科醫師使用的骨科手術計畫；該公司握有來自頂尖骨科公司的八位數意向書，並正申請 FDA 510(k) 許可。

summary.en: Helps healthcare providers communicate with non-English-speaking patients in real time.
summary.zh: 協助醫療提供者即時與非英語病患溝通。

highlight.en: Opalite is a voice AI medical interpreter that runs inside clinical workflows, available 24/7 to replace traditional interpreters more reliably and cheaply.
highlight.zh: Opalite 是一套語音 AI 醫療口譯，能嵌入臨床工作流程、全天候提供服務，以更高的可靠度與更低成本取代傳統口譯。

summary.en: The first AI-powered grand strategy platform and alternate-history sandbox game.
summary.zh: 首款 AI 驅動的大戰略平台兼架空歷史沙盒遊戲。

highlight.en: Pax Historia lets players pick a country and moment to rewrite history, and has organically reached tens of thousands of daily players in four months.
highlight.zh: Pax Historia 讓玩家選擇國家與時間點來改寫歷史，四個月內已自然累積數萬名每日活躍玩家。

summary.en: A unified trading platform for prediction markets.
summary.zh: 一個整合預測市場的交易平台。

highlight.en: Valence aggregates and executes contracts across Kalshi, Polymarket, and others, surfacing arbitrage in real time and giving traders API and backtesting tools.
highlight.zh: Valence 跨 Kalshi、Polymarket 等平台彙整並執行合約，即時揭露套利機會，並為交易者提供 API 與回測工具。

summary.en: AI agents that grow revenue for home-services businesses.
summary.zh: 為居家服務業者提升營收的 AI 代理。

highlight.en: Robby combines customer and third-party data to generate leads and arm technicians with talking points; on launch day it helped close $40k in an hour.
highlight.zh: Robby 結合客戶與第三方資料以產生潛在客戶，並為技師提供話術；上線當天一小時內就協助成交 4 萬美元。

summary.en: Energy-independent data centers powered by solar and repurposed EV batteries.
summary.zh: 以太陽能與再利用電動車電池供電、能源獨立的資料中心。

highlight.en: Voxel bypasses utility connection delays with a novel DC microgrid and second-life EV batteries to generate data center power on site at lower cost.
highlight.zh: Voxel 以新穎的直流微電網與二次利用的電動車電池，繞過電力公司併網延遲，在現場以更低成本為資料中心發電。

summary.en: Robots that automate unloading loose-loaded containers in warehouses.
summary.zh: 在倉庫中自動化散裝貨櫃卸貨的機器人。

highlight.en: Servo7 deploys robots for logistics' most demanding job, container unloading, with customers including CEVA, Stord, DHL, and PostNL.
highlight.zh: Servo7 部署機器人來處理物流中最艱辛的工作——貨櫃卸貨，客戶包括 CEVA、Stord、DHL 與 PostNL。

summary.en: Discovers autoimmune-disease drugs by harnessing parasite biology with AI.
summary.zh: 運用 AI 借助寄生蟲生物學發掘自體免疫疾病藥物。

highlight.en: Ditto Bio uses AI to identify immune-controlling proteins evolved by viruses, ticks, and worms, then engineers them into next-generation autoimmune therapies.
highlight.zh: Ditto Bio 運用 AI 辨識病毒、壁蝨與蠕蟲演化出的免疫調控蛋白，再將其改造為次世代自體免疫療法。

summary.en: A wearable that automatically tracks strength training for people focused on longevity.
summary.zh: 一款為注重長壽者自動追蹤重量訓練的穿戴裝置。

highlight.en: Fort uses heart rate and motion data to track strength workouts without manual logging, then gives actionable feedback that accounts for training fatigue.
highlight.zh: Fort 利用心率與動作資料追蹤重量訓練、無需手動記錄，再提供考量訓練疲勞的可行動回饋。

summary.en: An AI on-call engineer for data-heavy, regulated industries like finance and healthcare.
summary.zh: 為金融、醫療等資料密集且受監管產業打造的 AI 待命工程師。

highlight.en: Corelayer continuously monitors alerts, logs, infra, and data, using agents to debug and suggest fixes for clients from growth-stage fintechs to S&P 500 firms.
highlight.zh: Corelayer 持續監控警示、日誌、基礎設施與底層資料，運用代理除錯並建議修正方案，客戶從成長期金融科技到標普 500 公司皆有。

summary.en: AI-powered power-grid planning software that runs in your browser.
summary.zh: 在瀏覽器中運行的 AI 電網規劃軟體。

highlight.en: Squid gives grid teams one unified, trusted network model so planning stays consistent; its founders spent years inside National Grid, Octopus Energy, and AWS.
highlight.zh: Squid 為電網團隊提供單一、可信的統一網路模型，讓規劃保持一致；其創辦人曾在 National Grid、Octopus Energy 與 AWS 任職多年。

summary.en: A legislative consulting firm staffed by AI agents for government affairs.
summary.zh: 一家由 AI 代理組成、處理政府事務的立法顧問公司。

highlight.en: Fed10 monitors every U.S. bill, flags threats to your business, and delivers a $500/hr consultant's insights in seconds; its founders are three ex-lobbyists.
highlight.zh: Fed10 監控全美每一項法案、標記對你業務的威脅，並在數秒內提供等同時薪 500 美元顧問的洞見；創辦人為三位前遊說人士。

summary.en: Frontier AI defenses against social-engineering attacks.
summary.zh: 對抗社交工程攻擊的前沿 AI 防禦。

highlight.en: BeeSafe deploys undercover AI agents that engage attackers across SMS, voice, email, and social to expose infrastructure and build a dataset of their behavior.
highlight.zh: BeeSafe 部署臥底 AI 代理，跨簡訊、語音、電子郵件與社群與攻擊者周旋，揭露其基礎設施並建立其行為資料集。

summary.en: An AI-native platform for life-sciences regulatory and medical documentation.
summary.zh: 為生命科學法規與醫學文件打造的 AI 原生平台。

highlight.en: Ritivel's agents draft regulatory submissions like CTDs, CSRs, and INDs in Word in minutes instead of weeks, following FDA formatting from clinical data.
highlight.zh: Ritivel 的代理在 Word 中依 FDA 格式並引用臨床資料，於數分鐘而非數週內草擬 CTD、CSR、IND 等法規送件。

summary.en: Automates administrative work for aircraft mechanics.
summary.zh: 為飛機機械師自動化行政工作。

highlight.en: Zymbly focuses on taking the administrative burden off aircraft mechanics so they can spend more time on hands-on maintenance.
highlight.zh: Zymbly 專注於減輕飛機機械師的行政負擔，讓他們能將更多時間投入實際維修工作。

summary.en: Builds intelligence for cultural institutions, starting with libraries.
summary.zh: 為文化機構打造智慧工具，從圖書館開始。

highlight.en: Librar Labs' first product is an AI-native OS for school and public libraries that saves librarians time on tedious tasks so they can focus on their patrons.
highlight.zh: Librar Labs 的首款產品是為學校與公共圖書館打造的 AI 原生作業系統，協助館員省下處理繁瑣事務的時間，專注服務讀者。

summary.en: Autonomous AI drones that herd cattle on large ranches.
summary.zh: 在大型牧場上趕牛的自主 AI 無人機。

highlight.en: GrazeMate's drones position around a mob and move them on a schedule, while also estimating animal weights, measuring grass biomass, and flagging sick animals.
highlight.zh: GrazeMate 的無人機在牛群周圍定位並依排程驅趕，同時估算牲畜體重、量測牧草生物量並標記病牛。

summary.en: Multi-chain crypto deposit and payment infrastructure.
summary.zh: 多鏈加密貨幣存款與支付基礎設施。

highlight.en: Unifold is a developer-first API and SDK that lets any app accept on-chain deposits across any chain and token in fewer than 10 lines of code.
highlight.zh: Unifold 是以開發者為先的 API 與 SDK，讓任何應用以不到 10 行程式碼即可跨任何鏈與代幣接受鏈上存款。

summary.en: Software for enterprise energy procurement that cuts large consumers' electricity costs.
summary.zh: 為企業能源採購打造、降低大用戶電費的軟體。

highlight.en: Built by former electricity traders and physicists, Condor's AI software helps C&I and data-center clients optimize procurement for cheap, reliable power.
highlight.zh: Condor 由前電力交易員與物理學家打造，AI 軟體協助工商與資料中心客戶最佳化採購，取得便宜可靠的電力。

summary.en: AI takeoffs that help electricians submit competitive bids faster.
summary.zh: 協助電工更快提交具競爭力標案的 AI 估算工具。

highlight.en: Bidflow uses vision models to read and count complex symbols in large CAD PDFs at 99% accuracy, cutting estimating time from hours or days to a fraction.
highlight.zh: Bidflow 運用視覺模型以 99% 準確度讀取並計算大型 CAD PDF 中的複雜符號，將原本耗時數小時甚至數天的估算大幅縮短。

summary.en: Proactive AI customer support that engages high-value users before they reach out.
summary.zh: 在高價值使用者主動求助前就接觸他們的主動式 AI 客服。

highlight.en: Signals uses LLMs to authentically engage customers, cutting support tickets and driving upsells, and is the only AI agent allowed to send outbound iMessages.
highlight.zh: Signals 運用 LLM 以真誠方式接觸客戶，減少支援工單並促成加購，是唯一獲准主動發送 iMessage 的 AI 代理。

summary.en: A real-time signal intelligence platform for go-to-market teams.
summary.zh: 為市場進攻團隊打造的即時訊號情報平台。

highlight.en: Autumn monitors posts, commits, blogs, and announcements to surface buying signals the moment they appear, in a real-time feed filtered by your ICP and intents.
highlight.zh: Autumn 監控貼文、程式提交、部落格與公告，在購買訊號出現的當下即予揭露，並依你的理想客戶輪廓與意圖提供即時資訊流。

summary.en: Building an AI-native liquidity layer for private markets.
summary.zh: 為私募市場打造 AI 原生的流動性層。

highlight.en: Alt-X uses AI to automate diligence, valuation, investor matching, and execution, starting with venture-backed secondaries to make private assets liquid.
highlight.zh: Alt-X 運用 AI 自動化盡職調查、估值、投資人媒合與交易執行，從創投支持的次級交易切入，使私募資產得以流通。

summary.en: An operating system for data quality across any data stack.
summary.zh: 橫跨任何資料架構的資料品質作業系統。

highlight.en: Velum automatically monitors and enforces data quality so bad data never reaches dashboards, turning it from a manual task into self-running infrastructure.
highlight.zh: Velum 自動監控並落實資料品質，讓劣質資料永遠不會進到儀表板，將其從手動工作轉變為自我運行的基礎設施。

summary.en: A control plane that securely manages what AI agents can access and do.
summary.zh: 一個安全管理 AI 代理可存取與執行範圍的控制平面。

highlight.en: Agentic Fabriq gives each agent an identity, scoped permissions, approval flows, and audit logs, so teams use agents without shared API keys or broad accounts.
highlight.zh: Agentic Fabriq 為每個代理賦予身分、範圍化權限、審批流程與稽核日誌，讓團隊無需共用 API 金鑰或過度授權帳號即可使用代理。
